# LLM Project Instructions

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This file contains the primary guidelines for all AI agents working on the Precision Popup Killer project (SA-50). Read and adhere to these guidelines during every session.

## Documentation Maintenance
- **Keep README.md Updated**: Every time a new feature is fully implemented or a significant decision is made, update the [README.md](../../README.md) to reflect the changes. Keep descriptions concise and technical.

## Core Project Rules
- **No Extra Code blocks**: Always use the appropriate edit tools (`replace_string_in_file`, etc.) for code changes. Do not print large code blocks unless explicitly asked.
- **Performance First**: Since this is a browser extension, ensure all logic is performance-optimized to prevent browser lag or "flashes" of intrusive content.
- **Strict Selectors**: Use robust selectors that are unlikely to catch unintentional elements.
